## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New gas rule
- [ ] New feature / reporter
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` and it is clean.
- [ ] I ran `npm test` and all tests pass.
- [ ] I ran the CLI against `examples/Wasteful.sol` and the output looks correct.
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change.
- [ ] For a new rule: it fires on a dirty fixture and stays silent on a clean one.
- [ ] For a new rule: I cited the gas rationale (why it saves gas).
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased** (if user-facing).
